case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. JOSEPH TODD TUGGLE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-09-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CHARLENE HASTINGS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH TODD TUGGLE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH MEYERS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
